title: Mouth Watering Chinese Cashew Nuts Dan Dan Mian
description: A spicy and savory Sichuan dish featuring cashew nuts and dan dan mian, perfect for a sick day, and diabetic-friendly. This recipe is grilled to perfection and packed with fermented flavors.
instructions: Cook the dan dan mian noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and toasted Sichuan peppercorns.
Grill the diced chicken breast until cooked through and chop into smaller pieces.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat and stir-fry the chopped scallions until fragrant.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the grilled chicken, cashew nuts, and soy sauce mixture to the skillet and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
Garnish with additional chopped scallions and cashew nuts if desired.
